Class AbstractProjectContextProvider

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context.BasicContextProvider
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context.AbstractProjectContextProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
ContextProvider, PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProjectAlertsContextProvider, ProjectContextProvider, ProjectStructureContextProvider
public abstract class AbstractProjectContextProvider extends BasicContextProvider
Common base class for context providers that are bound to a specific NetBeans project. Centralizes project resolution, toolkit access, and IDE UI synchronization logic.
Author:
anahata

  • Field Details

    • projectsToolkit

      protected final Projects projectsToolkit
      The parent Projects toolkit instance.

    • projectPath

      protected final String projectPath
      The absolute canonical path to the project root.

    • project

      protected transient org.netbeans.api.project.Project project
      The cached NetBeans project instance. Marked transient as it cannot be serialized directly.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractProjectContextProvider

      public AbstractProjectContextProvider(String id, String name, String description, Projects projectsToolkit, String projectPath)
      Constructs a new project-bound context provider.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier for this provider.
      name - The human-readable name.
      description - A brief description of the provided context.
      projectsToolkit - The parent Projects toolkit.
      projectPath - The absolute path to the project.

  • Method Details

    • getProject

      public org.netbeans.api.project.Project getProject()
      Resolves the NetBeans Project instance, restoring it from the path if needed.
      Returns:
      The Project instance, or null if the project is no longer open.

    • setProviding

      public void setProviding(boolean enabled)
      Toggles the providing status and triggers a recursive IDE visual refresh.

      Implementation details: When the state changes, it identifies the project's root FileObject and notifies the IDE that icons and names in the project tree should be redrawn to reflect the current context state.

      Parameters:
      enabled - The new activation state.
